g.text: review & edit (no role-gated sign-off — anyone locks it themselves)
Mark Bolt Done (Phase 3 or the Bolts page)
Deployment Gate (Tech Lead + Security Reviewer sign-off)
maintenance event (manual · GitHub Issues · Taiga Issues)
route to Phase 1 discovery — never patched directly
Fast Lane → deploy / Secure Lane → Phase 4 (Regression Bypass)
deterministic Layer A (endpoints · scenarios · constraints · runtime)
Layer B confirms/corrects, optional adversarial panel
flag conformance_regressed / trace_flag → suggest re-open source phase
